html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

The Nightcap is a Hat that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It does not get used up. If worn while sleeping in a tent, Health and Sanity regenerate more quickly.

Gallery

  • Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Nightcap
"A cap for your sleepy head."
Object Info
Equipable
Crafting
×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"nightcaphat"
“No more bedhead for this scientist!”
–Wilson
“I've got a nightcap, now where's my candlestick?”
–Willow
“Is cozy sleeping hat.”
–Wolfgang
“There are so few comforts to be found in this wretched place.”
–Wendy
“IT KEEPS THE PROCESSOR WARM”
–WX-78
“I'm afraid I have no use for it.”
–Wickerbottom
“A good cap to wear when you're sawing logs.”
–Woodie
“I can't remember the last time I slept well.”
–Maxwell
“Prepare för slumber!”
–Wigfrid
“Father used to wear a nightcap just like that.”
–Webber
“A short nap might be nice.”
–Warly
“Sleepy hat”
–Wormwood
“A solid night's sleep'll help ya do a solid day's work.”
–Winona
“Keep your dreams warm and snug inside your sleepy head.”
–Wortox
“Sleepy-time hat.”
–Wurt
“It's a little sleeping bag for your head.”
–Walter
“This is no time for a nap!”
–Wanda
The Nightcap is a Hat that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It does not get used up. If worn while sleeping in a tent, Health and Sanity regenerate more quickly.

The '''Nightcap''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] that can be obtained at a [[Bunnyman Shrine]] for 4 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s. It does not get used up. If worn while sleeping in a tent, [[Health]] and [[Sanity]] regenerate more quickly.
